docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HUGHES, TIFFANY AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KEVIN DBA ABC PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUGHES, TIFFANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, KEVIN DBA ABC PARKING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
